node.text:
The Boys is a dark action drama series that shows a twisted version of superheroes. In this world, superheroes are not always good—they are powerful, corrupt, and often dangerous behind the scenes.
The story follows a group of normal people who decide to expose and fight these fake heroes. Led by a ruthless man, they take on the most powerful superhero team, risking their lives to reveal the truth.
Filled with intense action, shocking moments, and dark humor, the series breaks the typical superhero image and shows what power can really do to people. It’s brutal, unpredictable, and full of crazy twists.
Creator:-
Eric Kripke
Cast:-
Karl Urban
Antony Starr
Jack Quaid
Streaming Platform:-
Amazon Prime Video

node.text:
💬 Comment "GOOGLE" and I'll send you all 20.

Most people know Google as a search engine and maybe Gmail.

But behind the scenes, Google has quietly built one of the most powerful full stack AI ecosystems on the planet.

We are talking about 20 tools that cover everything from building AI models, deploying them, managing data, generating content, automating workflows, and scaling products faster than ever before.

Developers, creators, and businesses using this ecosystem are operating at a level most people cannot even see yet.

And the wildest part? Most of these tools are completely free to get started with.

This carousel breaks down 20 wonderful tools inside Google's full stack AI ecosystem that you cannot afford to miss.

🔖 Save this and start exploring before everyone else catches on.

➡️ Follow @alamin.8020ai for AI ecosystems, Google tools, and resources that keep you ahead of the curve.

#GoogleAI #FullStackAI #AITools #GoogleCloud #ArtificialIntelligence

rent ki gariyan le k flex karty huwe 😂

node.text: #🇳🇴 トロムソ（北極圏特集）が「ミッドナイトサン・ウィスパー・ネットワーク」を導入しました！ これは1基12kW、合計564kWの47基のマイクロ風力タービンを屋上やフィヨルド沿いに分散設置し、北極圏の一年中吹き続ける強風を利用して380世帯分のクリーンエネルギーを供給するものです。トロムソは世界初の冬季電力需要の23％を分散型マイクロ風力でまかなう亜北極都市となりました！⛰️💨⚡️🌌🏔️ この革新的なシステムにより、年間1,200トンの二酸化炭素排出が削減され、静かな景観を守りながら持続可能な都市づくりを実現しています。 トロムソは北極の絶え間ない風を街の灯りへと変え、ノルウェーのフィヨルドに未来のエネルギーを届けています。🇳🇴 北極圏の果てでも風は力になる — トロムソは、地域に寄り添う分散型エネルギーが寒冷地の暮らしを支えられることを証明しています！ 🌬️💚 #Tromsø #Norway #WindEnergy #MidnightSunWhisperNetwork ArcticInnovation ClimateAction RenewableNorway SustainableFjords
$2500 promo code in my story btw

node.text:
House playlist link in bio 💿

عام 1998 من تأليف وإخراج الأخوين كوين من بطولة جيف بريدجز الذي قام بدور جيف ليباوسكي وهو رجل من لوس انجلوس عاطل عن العمل وهو لاعب بولينج شره وبعد مشكلة بسبب تشابه الأسماء اختطفت زوجة ميليونير يدعى جيفري ليباوسكي وأستدعى المليونير جيف ليباوسكي لحل المشكلة وكلفه بتوصيل الفدية للخاطفين من أجل إطلاق سراح زوجته، ولكن تزداد الأمور سوءا عندما يقرر صديق ليباوسكي والتر سوبتشاك الذي قام بدوره جون غودمان بالأحتفاظ بالفدية.

الفيلم في غطى تكاليفه (15 مليون دولار) بتحقيقه عائدات تساوي (46 مليون دولار). هذه الارقام ليست عالية خصوصا ان الفيلم اشترك فيه العديد من النجوم و فنيا لم يلقى الكثير من الصيت، ولكن بعد ذلك تحولت الآراء النقدية وقيمته تقييما إيجابيا وأصبح الفيلم أيقونه ثقافية وأصبح له جماهيرية واسعة، وفي عام 2002 كرس بعض محبي الفيلم من مدينة لويفيل كنتاكي جهودهم لإنشاء مهرجان خاص بعشاق الفيلم. في العام 2014, اختارت مكتبة الكونغرس إضافة الفيلم إلى مجموعة (السجل الوطني للأفــلام) المرموقة لما له من تأثير ثقافي و فني.

node.text: ❤️لاحوله ولا قوه الا بل الله ❤️سبحان الله❤️ استغفر الله الذي لا اله الا هو الحي القيوم وا اتوب اليه❤️ الحمدلله ❤️سبحان الله وبحمد❤️ سبحان الله العظيم ❤️لا اله الا الله وحده لا شريك له له الملك وله الحمد وهو على كل شي قدير❤️لا اله الا انت سبحانك اني كنتو من الضالمين❤️ اشهد ان لا اله الا الله واشهد ان محمد رسول الله ❤️ الحمدلله ❤️بسم الله ❤️ الحمدلله دائما وابدا❤️ الله اكبر ❤️ما شاء الله ❤️ توكلنا على الله 💛انسخ علق💛

node.text:
That’s such a wholesome story! Sometimes, a child’s perspective is exactly the reminder we need that the world can be a much kinder and more imaginative place than we often give it credit for.

In a world that can sometimes feel heavy, it’s the small, unfiltered moments of childhood wonder that truly brighten our day. This beautiful story reminds us that while we, as adults, often carry the weight of labels, misunderstandings, and societal expectations, children see the world through a much simpler, more magical lens.

When a young boy spent his time at the supermarket staring at a woman in her traditional hijab and jilbab, it would have been easy to assume the worst. We’ve become so conditioned to expect judgment or discomfort. Instead, this little "feller" wasn't seeing a stranger or someone different—he was convinced he was in the presence of a real-life superhero. His loud, enthusiastic whisper of "I LOVE YOU BATMAN" is a perfect example of pure, innocent joy.

It’s a powerful lesson in perspective. Where we see difference, children often see wonder. This moment of connection, sparked by a toddler’s imagination, turned what could have been an awkward encounter into a memory filled with warmth and a bit of "Caped Crusader" magic. Let’s all try to look at each other with a little more of that wide-eyed wonder today.

#wholesomemoments #humanity #superherovibes #childhoodwonder #kindnessmatters
Whispers loudly? I thought whispering was talking quietly. So, how can you talk quitely loudly

node.text:
🎬 

Fact: Manolete (2008) This biographical drama tells the tragic life story of the legendary Spanish bullfighter Manuel Rodriguez Sanchez, known as Manolete, and his tumultuous love affair with the actress Lupe Sino.

The film faced a notoriously difficult production journey and was delayed for several years due to financial disputes and legal issues, leading many to believe it would never see a theatrical release. 

Despite featuring Academy Award winners Adrien Brody and Penelope Cruz, the movie was met with mixed reviews, though critics widely praised Brody’s physical transformation and striking resemblance to the real-life matador.

A notable detail about the production is that Adrien Brody underwent rigorous training with professional bullfighters to ensure his movements in the ring were authentic, even though the film heavily utilized digital effects to recreate the bulls and maintain safety on set.
He is the Final Boss of the ugly. But on Looks she means
Beautiful physically ugly spiritually i guess

node.text: This meme shows a flight attendant in a red uniform rushing down an airplane aisle in panic, only to trip and fall after overhearing the pilot accidentally confess over the mic that he plans to flirt with her after landing — it plays on the chaos that unfolds when private thoughts become public, turning authority into embarrassment and urgency into comedy. The situation builds on anticipation versus reality, where her frantic reaction feels justified until a child’s innocent comment undercuts everything, exposing how humans often overreact before events even happen. It reflects how we let imagination amplify situations, especially when ego or fear is involved, and how quickly seriousness can collapse into humor. In a world where everything is instantly heard, shared, and misinterpreted, the real punchline isn’t the pilot — it’s how we react before anything even happens.

node.text:
Como os agricultores separam os grãos de trigo da poeira e da palha sem máquinas? 🤯

O truque utiliza princípios simples da física. Os grãos de trigo, mais pesados, caem rapidamente porque a gravidade os puxa para baixo com mais força, enquanto as partículas de poeira, mais leves, permanecem suspensas no ar em movimento.

Uma ponte de malha ou peneira ajuda a filtrar os materiais com base no tamanho das partículas, permitindo que a poeira menor passe, enquanto retém os grãos maiores.

Este processo tradicional é um exemplo perfeito de como a gravidade, o fluxo de ar e a separação de partículas trabalham juntos no dia a dia.

física da separação de trigo e poeira, método tradicional de limpeza de grãos, separação de grãos por gravidade, ciência da separação de palha, malha de filtragem por tamanho de partícula, exemplo de física agrícola, processo de classificação de grãos agrícolas, física da separação por densidade, limpeza de grãos por fluxo de ar, método tradicional de limpeza de trigo, técnica agrícola simples baseada na física, demonstração de ciência agrícola, vídeos curtos de física agrícola

Este vídeo tem apenas fins educativos e motivacionais e utiliza alguns trechos sob a doutrina do uso justo para explicar a ciência de forma envolvente.

node.text:
Directed by Glenn Ficarra and John Requa, "Focus" (2015) is a stylish crime drama that blends romance with high-stakes cons. The story follows Nicky Spurgeon, a seasoned con artist, who takes novice grifter Jess under his wing. As their partnership grows into romance, trust and betrayal collide, leading to a dangerous game of manipulation when they cross paths years later in Buenos Aires. 

The film stars Will Smith as Nicky and Margot Robbie as Jess, with supporting performances from Rodrigo Santoro, Adrian Martinez, and BD Wong. Known for its sharp dialogue, glamorous settings, and twist-filled plot, "Focus" explores themes of trust, deception, and the blurred line between love and lies. 

How would you rate this film out of 10? 💭 

#focusmovie #willsmith #margotrobbie #crimedrama #conartist

node.text:
Comment “CYCLE SYNC” for a guide on how to support yourself too! 

If you want to understand yourself and your cycles, how to work WITH your body instead of against it for more pleasure, ease and flow, the guide will help. 🫶🏽

Our cycles are so powerful. The more we know, the more we thrive. ♥️

I’ve been cycle syncing for over a decade now. It has completely changed my life, opened up my feminine energy and healed my body. My business is also built to support my natural flow state. Freedom. 🙏🏽

It’s not about following a rigid system. It’s about learning how to listen to your body and find your own rhythm. 🌊

It unlocks the most alignment and authenticity you’ll ever experience because you’re finally acknowledging your body’s signals instead of ignoring them and pushing through. 

We burn out from trying to fit the mold of the 24-hour male hormonal cycle. It doesn’t make sense for our biology or energy and keeps us stuck in the hustle. 

Survival mode is OUT.

#cyclesyncing #cyclesyncingmethod #feminineflow #feminineenergy #menstrualcycleawareness 147 777 8888 11981 5
@nisha.trevor because it isn’t equal. You have 100 wants vs 5 wants of men…and you make a big deal of catering to those 5 needs and bash men for catering to 50. Jeez
@cryptonalyst please give me an example. What 50 needs?

node.text:
Dubai Desert Safari – Only 99 AED! 🐪🔥
Get ready for an unforgettable adventure in Dubai’s golden dunes 🌅 with Al Emirates Tours!
Book your Evening Desert Safari today — starting from just AED 99 😍

🌟 Your Safari Includes:
🚐 Pick & Drop from your location
🚙 Thrilling Dune Bashing
🐪 Camel Ride Experience
🔥 Live Entertainment – Belly Dance, Tanoura & Fire Show
🍢 BBQ Buffet Dinner (Veg & Non-Veg)
☕ Unlimited Tea, Coffee & Soft Drinks
📸 Henna & Traditional Dress Photoshoot

⚡ Optional Add-ons:
🏍️ Quad Bikes • 💺 VIP Seating • 🏕️ Private Camp

👶 Kids under 3 – FREE
💳 Book Now, Pay Later
📲 Instant Booking – 24/7 Available!

👉 Reserve Your Seats Today!
🟢 WhatsApp: wa.me/+923421280038

✨ Limited seats daily — don’t miss the real desert magic! 🌟

node.text: 🎬 Tikdam (2024) 🎥 Genre & Themes Tikdam is a family-oriented Hindi drama that blends slice-of-life storytelling with emotional and social themes — especially the bond between parents and children, small-town struggles, migration to bigger cities, and even subtle ecological messages about community and environment. 👨‍👩‍👧 Main Cast Amit Sial as Prakash (the father) Arisht Jain as Samay (son) Aarohi Saud as Cheeni (daughter) Divyansh Dwivedi as Bhanu (friend of the kids) Nayan Bhatt as Daadi (grandmother) Ajit Sarwotam Kelkar as Dadu (grandfather) Jeniffer Piccinato as Rose (hotel owner) 🧑‍🔧 Crew Director: Vivek Anchalia Story By: Animesh Verma Writers: Pankaj Nihalani, Vivek Anchalia Producer(s): Jyoti Deshpande, Parth Gajjar, Poonam Shroff, Savio Shenoy, Shweta Sharma Anchalia Cinematography: Parth Sayani Music: Daniel B. George 📖 Plot Summary The film centers on Prakash, a humble father who works at a hotel in a quiet hill town.

node.text:
Since 2022, 11 individuals with ties to U.S. defense, nuclear, and aerospace programs have died or disappeared. Some cases have identified suspects. Others remain open. Investigations are now active at the federal level. Draw your own conclusions

Follow @podcastotv for more Insights!

node.text:
The video provides a fascinating aerial perspective on the art of racing, specifically highlighting the stark contrast between a standard driving line and the high-performance "F1 line." While a casual driver might hug the inner curb or follow a wider, more intuitive path (shown in red), the F1-style approach (shown in green) prioritizes momentum and late-apex turns. By utilizing every inch of the track’s width and late-braking into the corners, the F1 line maximizes exit speed, allowing the car to carry significantly more velocity onto the straights. This visual breakdown serves as a masterclass in physics and precision, demonstrating that the fastest way around a track isn't always the shortest distance, but rather the path that maintains the highest average speed. It is a testament to the split-second decision-making and technical mastery required to compete at the pinnacle of motorsport.

(Dm For Credits Or Removal Of The Video)

#Formula1 #RacingLine #Motorsport #TrackDay #SpeedMastery

📈🇯🇵
この速度に達すると、もはや陸上を移動しているのではなく、音速で移動していることになります🚀🌍 このシミュレーションは、マッハ1、つまり時速約1,330kmで日本を超音速鉄道で旅するとどのような感じになるかを視覚化したものです。現在、日本の最速列車は約時速320kmで運行されており、超
